subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Know thou that We have not forgotten thee at any time or in any hour; nay, rather have We remembered thee with a tongue of truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین فاعلم بانا مانسیناک فی وقت و لا فیکل حین بل اذکرناک بلسان صدق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment
